SEARCH
Module storm.jackson2
Package st.orm.jackson

Class StormModule

java.lang.Object
com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.Module
com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.module.SimpleModule
st.orm.jackson.StormModule
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.fasterxml.jackson.core.Versioned, Serializable
public class StormModule extends com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.module.SimpleModule
Jackson module for serializing and deserializing Storm ORM Data types.

Handles:

  • Regular Data/Entity/Projection records (standard serialization)
  • Ref fields: serializes as the contained entity if loaded, or just the id if not
  • Deserialization of Ref fields: creates attached Refs via RefFactory if provided, otherwise creates DetachedRefs

Serialization formats:

  • Entity (loaded): {"@entity": {...}}
  • Projection (loaded): {"@id": ..., "@projection": {...}}
  • Unloaded: raw id value (e.g., 42 or "abc")

On deserialization, raw id values use the RefFactory (if provided) to create attached Refs, while object formats with @entity/@projection always create Refs via Ref.of().

Also supports nullable Ref values inside collections, e.g. List<Ref<Foo>> containing null.

See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • StormModule

      public StormModule()
      Creates a StormModule without a RefFactory. Ref fields with only an id will be deserialized as DetachedRefs.

    • StormModule

      public StormModule(@Nullable RefFactory refFactory)
      Creates a StormModule with the specified RefFactory.
      Parameters:
      refFactory - factory for creating attached Ref instances during deserialization, or null to create DetachedRefs

    • StormModule

      public StormModule(@Nullable Supplier<RefFactory> refFactorySupplier)
      Creates a StormModule with a RefFactory supplier.

      This constructor is useful when the RefFactory needs to be resolved dynamically, for example from a ThreadLocal, while still allowing the ObjectMapper to be cached.

      Parameters:
      refFactorySupplier - supplier for the RefFactory, or null to create DetachedRefs
